summary: DHH announces the release of Rails 0.7.0 as a step toward the 1.0 milestone. He highlights the convenience of RubyGems for easy upgrades and points readers to a free chapter on RubyGems from Programming Ruby, 2nd edition. The post is a brief, functional release announcement with minimal commentary.
key_points: Rails 0.7.0 released as an incremental step toward the 1.0 milestone
RubyGems enables frictionless upgrades for Rails users
Free educational resources on RubyGems available from the Programming Ruby book
key_insight: The early Rails ecosystem prioritized frictionless upgrades through RubyGems, setting a precedent for developer-friendly package management.
